title: Sambosa chapati
overview: follows the journey of Fareed, a brave young man who takes on illegal activities to support the oppressed and help them reclaim their rights. Along with his assistant, Waheed, they navigate a series of comedic and action-packed events while offering their services to those in need. Their operations come under police scrutiny, leading to a verdict of seven years in prison unless they can secure waivers from their clients. With 30 waivers obtained, they embark on a journey to India to find the last client who has returned home, encountering various challenges along the way.
